events.text: Goal!  England 0, France 1. Aurélien Tchouaméni (France) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Antoine Griezmann.
Antoine Griezmann (France) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Ousmane Dembélé (France) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  England 1, France 1. Harry Kane (England) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Goal!  England 1, France 2. Olivier Giroud (France) header from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Antoine Griezmann with a cross   following a corner.
Theo Hernández (France) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Penalty missed! Bad penalty by Harry Kane (England) right footed shot is just a bit too high. Harry Kane should be disappointed.
Harry Maguire (England) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
